message.content:
You are fixing ESLint warnings for RECO-809 in this NestJS repo.

TASK: Fix 6 ESLint warnings in `src/utils/mathematical-functions.util.ts`:
- Lines 629, 662, 695, 729, 764, 778: `custom-rules/require-object-params` — all 6 are function param issues

STEPS:
1. Create branch: `git checkout main && git checkout -b RECO-809-fix-eslint-mathematical-functions`
2. Read the file to understand all function signatures that need fixing
3. Convert positional params to named object params for all 6 functions, update ALL call sites
4. Run `npx eslint src/utils/mathematical-functions.util.ts` — verify 0 warnings
5. Run `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty` — verify types pass
6. Commit with --no-verify: "RECO-809: fix ESLint warnings in mathematical-functions.util.ts"
7. Push with --no-verify
8. Create PR via `gh pr create`

Add Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com> to commit.
Use --no-verify for both commit and push.
Search ENTIRE codebase for call sites when changing function signatures — these are utility functions likely called from many places.
NO COMMENTS in code per project rules.

input.command:
cat > /tmp/fix-test-util.py << 'PYEOF'
import re

with open('src/unit-tests/mathematical-functions.util.unit-spec.ts', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Fix segmentCost calls: MathematicalFunctions.segmentCost(values, start, end, method)
# -> MathematicalFunctions.segmentCost({ values, start: X, end: Y, method: Z })
content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.segmentCost\((\w+),\s*(\d+),\s*(\d+),\s*\'(\w+)\'\)',
    r"MathematicalFunctions.segmentCost({ values: \1, start: \2, end: \3, method: '\4' })",
    content
)

# Fix validateChangePoints calls with multi-line format
content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.validateChangePoints\(\s*\n\s*(\w+),\s*\n\s*(\w+),\s*\n\s*([\d.]+),\s*\n\s*\'(\w+)\',\s*\n\s*\)',
    r"MathematicalFunctions.validateChangePoints({\n\t\t\t\t\tvalues: \1,\n\t\t\t\t\tchangePoints: \2,\n\t\t\t\t\tsignificance: \3,\n\t\t\t\t\tmethod: '\4',\n\t\t\t\t})",
    content
)

# Fix isSignificantChangePoint calls with multi-line format
content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.isSignificantChangePoint\(\s*\n\s*(\w+),\s*\n\s*(\d+),\s*\n\s*(\d+),\s*\n\s*(\d+),\s*\n\s*([\d.]+),\s*\n\s*\'(\w+)\',\s*\n\s*\)',
    r"MathematicalFunctions.isSignificantChangePoint({\n\t\t\t\t\tvalues: \1,\n\t\t\t\t\tstart: \2,\n\t\t\t\t\tcp: \3,\n\t\t\t\t\tend: \4,\n\t\t\t\t\tsignificance: \5,\n\t\t\t\t\tmethod: '\6',\n\t\t\t\t})",
    content
)

# Fix buildSegments calls: MathematicalFunctions.buildSegments(values, changePoints)
content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.buildSegments\((\w+),\s*(\w+)\)',
    r'MathematicalFunctions.buildSegments({ values: \1, changePoints: \2 })',
    content
)

# Fix normalInverse calls: MathematicalFunctions.normalInverse(value)
content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.normalInverse\(([\d.eE+-]+)\)',
    r'MathematicalFunctions.normalInverse({ p: \1 })',
    content
)
# Also handle variable references like normalInverse(p) and normalInverse(1 - p)
content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.normalInverse\(p\)',
    r'MathematicalFunctions.normalInverse({ p })',
    content
)
content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.normalInverse\(1 - p\)',
    r'MathematicalFunctions.normalInverse({ p: 1 - p })',
    content
)

# Fix chiSquareInverse calls: MathematicalFunctions.chiSquareInverse(p, df)
content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.chiSquareInverse\(([\d.eE+-]+),\s*(\d+)\)',
    r'MathematicalFunctions.chiSquareInverse({ p: \1, df: \2 })',
    content
)

with open('src/unit-tests/mathematical-functions.util.unit-spec.ts', 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)

print("Done")
PYEOF
python3 /tmp/fix-test-util.py

python3 << 'PYEOF'
with open('/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service/src/utils/mathematical-functions.util.ts', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

replacements = [
    # 1. segmentCost signature
    (
        '\tprivate static segmentCost(\n\t\tvalues: number[],\n\t\tstart: number,\n\t\tend: number,\n\t\tmethod: string,\n\t): number {',
        '\tprivate static segmentCost({\n\t\tvalues,\n\t\tstart,\n\t\tend,\n\t\tmethod,\n\t}: {\n\t\tvalues: number[];\n\t\tstart: number;\n\t\tend: number;\n\t\tmethod: string;\n\t}): number {'
    ),
    # 2. validateChangePoints signature
    (
        '\tprivate static validateChangePoints(\n\t\tvalues: number[],\n\t\tchangePoints: number[],\n\t\tsignificance: number,\n\t\tmethod: string,\n\t): number[] {',
        '\tprivate static validateChangePoints({\n\t\tvalues,\n\t\tchangePoints,\n\t\tsignificance,\n\t\tmethod,\n\t}: {\n\t\tvalues: number[];\n\t\tchangePoints: number[];\n\t\tsignificance: number;\n\t\tmethod: string;\n\t}): number[] {'
    ),
    # 3. isSignificantChangePoint signature
    (
        '\tprivate static isSignificantChangePoint(\n\t\tvalues: number[],\n\t\tstart: number,\n\t\tcp: number,\n\t\tend: number,\n\t\tsignificance: number,\n\t\tmethod: string,\n\t): boolean {',
        '\tprivate static isSignificantChangePoint({\n\t\tvalues,\n\t\tstart,\n\t\tcp,\n\t\tend,\n\t\tsignificance,\n\t\tmethod,\n\t}: {\n\t\tvalues: number[];\n\t\tstart: number;\n\t\tcp: number;\n\t\tend: number;\n\t\tsignificance: number;\n\t\tmethod: string;\n\t}): boolean {'
    ),
    # 4. buildSegments signature
    (
        '\tprivate static buildSegments(\n\t\tvalues: number[],\n\t\tchangePoints: number[],\n\t): { start: number; end: number; mean: number; variance: number }[] {',
        '\tprivate static buildSegments({\n\t\tvalues,\n\t\tchangePoints,\n\t}: {\n\t\tvalues: number[];\n\t\tchangePoints: number[];\n\t}): { start: number; end: number; mean: number; variance: number }[] {'
    ),
    # 5. chiSquareInverse signature
    (
        '\tprivate static chiSquareInverse(p: number, df: number): number {',
        '\tprivate static chiSquareInverse({ p, df }: { p: number; df: number }): number {'
    ),
    # 6. normalInverse signature
    (
        '\tprivate static normalInverse(p: number): number {',
        '\tprivate static normalInverse({ p }: { p: number }): number {'
    ),
    # Call sites
    (
        'cost: this.segmentCost(values, 0, values.length - 1, method),',
        'cost: this.segmentCost({ values, start: 0, end: values.length - 1, method }),'
    ),
    (
        'const segmentCost = this.segmentCost(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tvalues,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tpreviousChangePoint,\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttimePoint - 1,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmethod,\n\t\t\t\t\t);',
        'const segmentCost = this.segmentCost({\n\t\t\t\t\t\tvalues,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstart: previousChangePoint,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tend: timePoint - 1,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmethod,\n\t\t\t\t\t});'
    ),
    (
        'if (this.isSignificantChangePoint(values, start, cp, end, significance, method)) {',
        'if (this.isSignificantChangePoint({ values, start, cp, end, significance, method })) {'
    ),
    (
        'const ll0 = -this.segmentCost(fullSegment, 0, fullSegment.length - 1, method);',
        'const ll0 = -this.segmentCost({ values: fullSegment, start: 0, end: fullSegment.length - 1, method });'
    ),
    (
        '-this.segmentCost(leftSegment, 0, leftSegment.length - 1, method) -\n\t\t\tthis.segmentCost(rightSegment, 0, rightSegment.length - 1, method);',
        '-this.segmentCost({ values: leftSegment, start: 0, end: leftSegment.length - 1, method }) -\n\t\t\tthis.segmentCost({ values: rightSegment, start: 0, end: rightSegment.length - 1, method });'
    ),
    (
        'const validatedChangePoints = this.validateChangePoints(\n\t\t\tvalues,\n\t\t\tchangePoints,\n\t\t\tsignificance,\n\t\t\tmethod,\n\t\t);',
        'const validatedChangePoints = this.validateChangePoints({\n\t\t\tvalues,\n\t\t\tchangePoints,\n\t\t\tsignificance,\n\t\t\tmethod,\n\t\t});'
    ),
    (
        'const segments = this.buildSegments(values, validatedChangePoints);',
        'const segments = this.buildSegments({ values, changePoints: validatedChangePoints });'
    ),
    (
        'const criticalValue = this.chiSquareInverse(1 - significance, df);',
        'const criticalValue = this.chiSquareInverse({ p: 1 - significance, df });'
    ),
    (
        'const z = this.normalInverse(p);',
        'const z = this.normalInverse({ p });'
    ),
]

for old, new in replacements:
    if old in content:
        content = content.replace(old, new, 1)
        print(f"OK: replaced pattern starting with '{old[:50]}...'")
    else:
        print(f"MISS: pattern not found: '{old[:50]}...'")

with open('/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service/src/utils/mathematical-functions.util.ts', 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)

print("\nDone writing file")
PYEOF

import re

filepath = '/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service/src/unit-tests/mathematical-functions.util.unit-spec.ts'
with open(filepath, 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Fix segmentCost calls: MathematicalFunctions.segmentCost(values, start, end, method)
content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.segmentCost\((\w+),\s*(\d+),\s*(\d+),\s*\'(\w+)\'\)',
    r"MathematicalFunctions.segmentCost({ values: \1, start: \2, end: \3, method: '\4' })",
    content
)

# Fix validateChangePoints - multiline with tabs
content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.validateChangePoints\(\n\t+(\w+),\n\t+(\w+),\n\t+([\d.]+),\n\t+\'(\w+)\',\n\t+\)',
    lambda m: f"MathematicalFunctions.validateChangePoints({{\n\t\t\t\t\tvalues: {m.group(1)},\n\t\t\t\t\tchangePoints: {m.group(2)},\n\t\t\t\t\tsignificance: {m.group(3)},\n\t\t\t\t\tmethod: '{m.group(4)}',\n\t\t\t\t}})",
    content
)

# Fix isSignificantChangePoint - multiline with tabs
content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.isSignificantChangePoint\(\n\t+(\w+),\n\t+(\d+),\n\t+(\d+),\n\t+(\d+),\n\t+([\d.]+),\n\t+\'(\w+)\',\n\t+\)',
    lambda m: f"MathematicalFunctions.isSignificantChangePoint({{\n\t\t\t\t\tvalues: {m.group(1)},\n\t\t\t\t\tstart: {m.group(2)},\n\t\t\t\t\tcp: {m.group(3)},\n\t\t\t\t\tend: {m.group(4)},\n\t\t\t\t\tsignificance: {m.group(5)},\n\t\t\t\t\tmethod: '{m.group(6)}',\n\t\t\t\t}})",
    content
)

# Fix buildSegments calls
content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.buildSegments\((\w+),\s*(\w+)\)',
    r'MathematicalFunctions.buildSegments({ values: \1, changePoints: \2 })',
    content
)

# Fix normalInverse calls with numeric literals
content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.normalInverse\(([\d.]+)\)',
    r'MathematicalFunctions.normalInverse({ p: \1 })',
    content
)
# normalInverse(-0.1)
content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.normalInverse\((-[\d.]+)\)',
    r'MathematicalFunctions.normalInverse({ p: \1 })',
    content
)
# normalInverse(p) with variable
content = content.replace(
    'MathematicalFunctions.normalInverse(p)',
    'MathematicalFunctions.normalInverse({ p })'
)
# normalInverse(1 - p)
content = content.replace(
    'MathematicalFunctions.normalInverse(1 - p)',
    'MathematicalFunctions.normalInverse({ p: 1 - p })'
)

# Fix chiSquareInverse calls
content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.chiSquareInverse\(([\d.]+),\s*(\d+)\)',
    r'MathematicalFunctions.chiSquareInverse({ p: \1, df: \2 })',
    content
)
content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.chiSquareInverse\((-[\d.]+),\s*(\d+)\)',
    r'MathematicalFunctions.chiSquareInverse({ p: \1, df: \2 })',
    content
)
content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.chiSquareInverse\(([\d.]+),\s*(-\d+)\)',
    r'MathematicalFunctions.chiSquareInverse({ p: \1, df: \2 })',
    content
)

with open(filepath, 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)

print("Done")
PYEOF

content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.validateChangePoints\(\n\t+(\w+),\n\t+(\w+),\n\t+([\d.]+),\n\t+\'(\w+)\',\n\t+\)',
    lambda m: f"MathematicalFunctions.validateChangePoints({{\n\t\t\t\t\tvalues: {m.group(1)},\n\t\t\t\t\tchangePoints: {m.group(2)},\n\t\t\t\t\tsignificance: {m.group(3)},\n\t\t\t\t\tmethod: '{m.group(4)}',\n\t\t\t\t}})",
    content
)

# Fix isSignificantChangePoint - multiline
content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.isSignificantChangePoint\(\n\t+(\w+),\n\t+(\d+),\n\t+(\d+),\n\t+(\d+),\n\t+([\d.]+),\n\t+\'(\w+)\',\n\t+\)',
    lambda m: f"MathematicalFunctions.isSignificantChangePoint({{\n\t\t\t\t\tvalues: {m.group(1)},\n\t\t\t\t\tstart: {m.group(2)},\n\t\t\t\t\tcp: {m.group(3)},\n\t\t\t\t\tend: {m.group(4)},\n\t\t\t\t\tsignificance: {m.group(5)},\n\t\t\t\t\tmethod: '{m.group(6)}',\n\t\t\t\t}})",
    content
)

# Fix buildSegments calls
content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.buildSegments\((\w+),\s*(\w+)\)',
    r'MathematicalFunctions.buildSegments({ values: \1, changePoints: \2 })',
    content
)

# Fix normalInverse calls
content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.normalInverse\(([\d.]+)\)',
    r'MathematicalFunctions.normalInverse({ p: \1 })',
    content
)
content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.normalInverse\((-[\d.]+)\)',
    r'MathematicalFunctions.normalInverse({ p: \1 })',
    content
)
content = content.replace(
    'MathematicalFunctions.normalInverse(p)',
    'MathematicalFunctions.normalInverse({ p })'
)
content = content.replace(
    'MathematicalFunctions.normalInverse(1 - p)',
    'MathematicalFunctions.normalInverse({ p: 1 - p })'
)

# Fix chiSquareInverse calls
content = re.sub(
    r'MathematicalFunctions\.chiSquareInverse\(([\d.-]+),\s*([\d-]+)\)',
    r'MathematicalFunctions.chiSquareInverse({ p: \1, df: \2 })',
    content
)

# Also need to remove @ts-expect-error comments since the methods are now using object params
# and the ts-expect-error would cause errors if the type is correct
# Actually, wait - the methods are still private, so @ts-expect-error is still needed

with open(filepath, 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)

# Verify
remaining = content.count('MathematicalFunctions.segmentCost(')
remaining += content.count('MathematicalFunctions.validateChangePoints(')  
remaining += content.count('MathematicalFunctions.isSignificantChangePoint(')
remaining += content.count('MathematicalFunctions.buildSegments(')
remaining += content.count('MathematicalFunctions.normalInverse(')
remaining += content.count('MathematicalFunctions.chiSquareInverse(')

remaining_obj = content.count('MathematicalFunctions.segmentCost({')
remaining_obj += content.count('MathematicalFunctions.validateChangePoints({')
remaining_obj += content.count('MathematicalFunctions.isSignificantChangePoint({')
remaining_obj += content.count('MathematicalFunctions.buildSegments({')
remaining_obj += content.count('MathematicalFunctions.normalInverse({')
remaining_obj += content.count('MathematicalFunctions.chiSquareInverse({')

print(f"Total calls: {remaining}, Object-style calls: {remaining_obj}, Positional remaining: {remaining - remaining_obj}")
PYEOF
